name: ts-pmo
description: TS PMO (Task Steward · Project Management Ops) — a project-management agent for Claude Code, backed by a Notion template. It learns your goals, keeps you accountable, and runs your work management. Skills: set-direction, create, surface-effort, plan, work-review, debrief, resync, plus ts-pmo-setup (one-time first-run wiring). Every skill recommends and asks before it writes.
